hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer · Cloud Engineer
hero.description: Building modern, performant web experiences with React and Next.js. Strong foundation in full stack development, cloud, and DevOps, ensuring scalable and efficient applications.

about.p1: Frontend is where I feel most at home, building interfaces that are fast, accessible, and feel right to use. I work across the full stack and know my way around backend and cloud infrastructure, but the UI is what I care about most.
about.p2: Three years of professional experience shipping web products, with a background in cloud engineering that makes me comfortable owning a feature end to end, from API to deployment.
about.p3: Outside of work I play music, paint and used to make games. I'm a creative person at heart, which I think shows in how I approach UI: details matter, and things should feel as good as they look.

projects.intro: A selection of the projects I'm most proud of. More work is available on my

items.title: Proovit
items.description: A social challenge app built with Expo and Node.js, combining daily prompts, proof uploads, AI validation, and competitive group play.

items.title: Shoot'em Up!
items.description: A browser-playable shoot 'em up game built in Unity and published on itch.io.

items.title: Pug Adventure
items.description: A 2D platformer game featuring a pug protagonist, developed and released on itch.io.

gallery.heading: Gallery
gallery.subheading: A selection of digital and traditional paintings.
gallery.bouguereauDesc: Digital study after William-Adolphe Bouguereau, exploring classical light and shadow.
gallery.partyDesc: A digital painting painted from photo reference, capturing a spontaneous moment from a night out with friends.
gallery.despairDesc: An expressive figure study exploring themes of anguish and raw emotion.
gallery.forestPortraitDesc: Digital portrait painted from photo reference, with a focus on natural light and skin tones.
gallery.dragonDesc: Traditional painting of a fierce dragon, done with acrylic on paper.
gallery.totoroDesc: Watercolour recreation of the iconic bus stop scene from My Neighbour Totoro.
gallery.flowerPortraitDesc: Digital portrait painted from photo reference, with a natural, sun-drenched atmosphere.
gallery.beachPortraitDesc: Digital portrait painted from photo reference, exploring warm backlighting and saturated colours.
gallery.joyfulPortraitDesc: Digital portrait painted from photo reference, with vivid colours and warm skin tones.
gallery.doublePortraitDesc: Double digital portrait painted from photo reference, capturing a warm and intimate moment between two people.
gallery.multicolourPortraitDesc: Digital portrait of a young person in a natural outdoor setting, with soft ambient light.
gallery.traditionalPortraitDesc: Traditional portrait painted from photo reference, emphasising the subject's gaze and expression, done with acrylic on paper.

hero.title: Proovit
hero.subtitle: A social challenge app developed with a friend. Each user receives a challenge and uploads photo proof from their phone. It is then validated with AI, and the app keeps track of the results, so users can compete with friends and see their progress on a global leaderboard.

items.title: Daily challenge rotation
items.description: An random daily challenge is presented to all users, and they have 24 hours to complete it. Challenges are maintained by scheduled backend tasks, making the experience fresh and engaging every day.

items.title: Uploading photo proof
items.description: Depending on the challenge, users can upload photo proof from their device's camera or gallery. This allows more flexibility for challenges, allowing users to upload memories as well as real-time proof

items.title: AI-assisted validation
items.description: Uploaded proofs are reviewed with OpenAI to flag whether the challenge is actually completed, rewarding the user if successful and preventing cheating.

items.title: Social aspect
items.description: Users can add captions to their posts, comment on their friends' and give them upvotes. This makes each challenge a shared event.

items.title: Private groups
items.description: Private groups can enable default challenge rotations and run custom challenges. Members of these groups are the ones validating each other's proofs, instead of AI.

items.title: Gamification and retention
items.description: Coins, achievements, streaks, rankings, spins, and push notifications reinforce retention and give the product a strong sense of momentum.

design.description: The UI language is built to feel dynamic and competitive: high contrast surfaces, a sharp accent color, expressive type, and animations with Lottie assets.
design.fontDescription: Outfit is chosen for its geometric shapes and clean rhythm across small labels, large headings, and mobile interfaces.
